title: Lepidocupania gracilipes
taxonomy: Lepidocupania gracilipes is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to New Caledonia, a French territory in the Pacific Ocean. Lepidocupania gracilipes is part of the genus Lepidocupania, which is a small group of flowering plants. The classification of Lepidocupania gracilipes is as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Celastrales, family Celastraceae, genus Lepidocupania, and species L. gracilipes. Further research may be needed for more detailed information about this plant species.
